summaryAm: ደግ ልጅ በመንገድ ላይ ሰዎችን በመርዳት ደስታን የሚያገኝበት ቀላል እና ቀልድ ያለው ታሪክ።
moralAm: ደግነት ደስታን ያበዛል፣ ትንሽ ማጋራትም ትልቅ ፈገግታ ያመጣል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This adaptation keeps the humor gentle and safe.

pages.textAm: አንድ ደግ ልጅ በጫካ ዳር እንጨት ይሰበስብ ነበር። ምሳውንም ከተራበ አሮጌ ተጓዥ ጋር አጋራ።
pages.textEn: A kind boy gathered wood and shared his lunch with a hungry traveler.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind boy sharing lunch with an old traveler near a forest path.

pages.textAm: ተጓዡ በደስታ አመሰገነው። “በዚያ ዛፍ ሥር ያለውን ስጦታ ተመልከት” አለው።
pages.textEn: The traveler thanked him and pointed to a gift under a tree.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The traveler pointing kindly toward a tree stump glowing softly in the forest.

pages.textAm: ልጁ በዛፉ ሥር ወርቃማ ቀለም ያላት ዝይ አገኘ። ዝይዋ በቀስታ ተንቀሳቀሰችና “ጋክ!” አለች።
pages.textEn: Under the tree he found a goose with golden feathers.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A cheerful golden goose under a tree beside a surprised kind boy.

pages.textAm: ልጁ ዝይዋን ይዞ መንደር ሲገባ፣ ሰዎች በብርሃኗ ተገረሙ። ልጁ ግን “ደግነት ስጦታው ነው” አለ።
pages.textEn: People in the village wondered at the goose's glow.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The boy entering a village with a golden goose while villagers smile with wonder.

pages.textAm: ዝይዋ በመንደሩ አደባባይ ትንሽ ዳንስ ጀመረች። ልጆች ሳቁ፣ አዋቂዎችም ፈገግ አሉ።
pages.textEn: The goose danced in the village square, and everyone smiled.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A golden goose dancing gently in a village square with children laughing.

pages.textAm: ልጁ ስጦታው ሰዎችን ማሳቅ እና ማቀራረብ እንደሚችል አየ። መንደሩም ይህን ብርሃን በደስታ መከተል ፈለገ።
pages.textEn: The boy saw that the gift could make people smile and come together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The kind boy and golden goose surrounded by happy villagers in warm evening light.

pages.textAm: በማግሥቱ ልጁ ዝይዋን ወደ መንደሩ ትልቅ ዛፍ አጠገብ ወሰዳት። ልጆች በክብ ተቀመጡ፣ አዋቂዎችም በርጋታ ተመለከቱ።
pages.textEn: The boy brought the goose to the village tree, where everyone gathered peacefully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind boy with a glowing golden goose under a large village tree.

pages.textAm: ዝይዋ በደስታ ተጓዘች፣ ሰዎችም እንዲስቁ አደረገች። ልጁ ግን “ይህ ስጦታ ለእኔ ብቻ አይደለም” ብሎ አስታወሰ።
pages.textEn: The goose brought laughter, and the boy remembered the gift was for sharing.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Golden goose waddling happily while villagers laugh gently in a sunny square.

pages.textAm: አንዲት አያት ሳቁን ስትሰማ ከቤቷ ወጣች። ልጁ ዝይዋን አቅርቦ “ዛሬ ደስታው ወደ እርስዎም ይመጣ” አለ።
pages.textEn: The boy brought joy to an elder who had stayed indoors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind boy and golden goose visiting a smiling grandmother near her doorway.

pages.textAm: በየሳምንቱ ሰዎች በአደባባይ ተሰበሰቡ። አንዱ ዘፈነ፣ ሌላው ታሪክ ነገረ፣ ዝይዋም በመካከላቸው ብርሃኗን አበራች።
pages.textEn: Each week the village shared songs, stories, and the goose’s gentle glow.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Village gathering with songs, stories, and a glowing golden goose at center.

pages.textAm: ልጁ ትልቁ ስጦታ ወርቃማው ቀለም ብቻ እንዳልሆነ ተማረ። ምሳን፣ ሳቅን እና ደግነትን ሲካፈል መንደሩ የበለጠ ብሩህ ሆነ።
pages.textEn: The boy learned that sharing kindness made the village brighter.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A bright happy village square at sunset with a boy and golden goose.
